frame_analyses.description: Animated diagram showing first half-hitch formation with green thread path traced 'Always Above Horizon' and yellow directional arrows

frame_analyses.description: Animated diagram showing second half-hitch formation with purple instrument and 'Above Horizon' guidance text
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Educational demonstration continuing with second half-hitch technique

frame_analyses.description: Demonstration of tightening two half-hitches with suture visible in trainer box, showing proper pulling technique
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Shows final tightening step with both working and tail ends being pulled

frame_analyses.description: Close-up view showing blocking sequence with active and passive thread conversion, demonstrating proper thread management

frame_analyses.description: Final blocking sequence demonstration showing converted passive and active threads with proper instrument positioning
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Shows completed thread conversion with clear labeling of converted active and passive threads

frame_analyses.description: Close-up of completed two half-hitches knot with blocking sequence and thread identification labels
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Final educational frame showing completed knot structure with clear thread identification

technique_summary: This video consists entirely of educational content demonstrating proper intracorporeal slip-knot (two half-hitches) technique. No actual FLS task performance is shown that can be scored according to the official rubric.
strengths: Clear educational demonstration of knot tying technique
Good visualization of thread management and blocking sequences
Proper labeling of active and passive threads
